Operation 'createCheck' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions ping URL but doesn't clarify the full response structure (check object with UUID). Missing clarity on upsert behavior and that the check becomes immediately active. Added details about response content and initial state for better AI agent understanding of side effects.

data.current_description: Creates a new check and returns its ping URL. All request parameters are optional and will use their default values if omitted. When the 'unique' field is specified, performs an upsert.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new check for monitoring. All request parameters are optional and will use their default values if omitted. When the 'unique' field is specified, performs an upsert operation (creates if not exists, updates if exists). Returns the created or updated check object with its ping URL and UUID. The check will be active and ready to receive pings immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Description mentions ping URL but doesn't clarify the full response structure (check object with UUID). Missing clarity on upsert behavior and that the check becomes immediately active. Added details about response content and initial state for better AI agent understanding of side effects.

message: Operation 'updateCheck' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Description explains partial update behavior well but doesn't clarify the response (updated check object) or that lookup supports both UUID and unique_key like the getCheck operation. Added return value clarity and lookup method consistency for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Updates an existing check. All request parameters are optional; only supplied fields are modified.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing check identified by UUID or unique_key. All request parameters are optional; only supplied fields are modified, allowing partial updates. Returns the updated check object with all current properties.
data.reasoning: Description explains partial update behavior well but doesn't clarify the response (updated check object) or that lookup supports both UUID and unique_key like the getCheck operation. Added return value clarity and lookup method consistency for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'resumeCheck' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description mentions the manual_resume requirement but doesn't explain what happens if it's false (operation fails). Missing clarity on response and side effects (monitoring re-enabled, pings processed). Added failure condition context and return value details for better AI agent understanding of when this operation is applicable and what it accomplishes.

data.current_description: Resumes a previously paused check. Only works if the check has manual_resume=true.
data.description_suggestion: Resumes monitoring for a previously paused check. Only works if the check has manual_resume=true, otherwise the operation will fail. Returns the resumed check object with monitoring re-enabled. The check will immediately begin receiving and processing pings.
data.reasoning: Description mentions the manual_resume requirement but doesn't explain what happens if it's false (operation fails). Missing clarity on response and side effects (monitoring re-enabled, pings processed). Added failure condition context and return value details for better AI agent understanding of when this operation is applicable and what it accomplishes.

message: Operation 'listPings' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about pagination, ordering, and what data each ping object contains. Added details about response structure and access requirements to improve AI agent understanding of what data will be returned and how to use it.

data.current_description: Returns a list of pings this check has received. Returns up to 100 pings for free accounts and 1000 for paid accounts.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of pings (heartbeat signals) this check has received, ordered by most recent first. Free accounts receive up to 100 pings; paid accounts receive up to 1000 pings. Each ping object includes timestamp, HTTP status code, and other diagnostic information. Requires read access to the check.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about pagination, ordering, and what data each ping object contains. Added details about response structure and access requirements to improve AI agent understanding of what data will be returned and how to use it.

message: Operation 'getPingBody' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too minimal. Added context about what 'body' means (request body content), how the ping is identified (sequence number), use cases (debugging/auditing), and access requirements. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Returns the body of a specific logged ping.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the request body content of a specific logged ping identified by its sequence number. Returns the raw body data that was sent with the ping request. Useful for debugging and auditing ping submissions. Requires read access to the check.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about what 'body' means (request body content), how the ping is identified (sequence number), use cases (debugging/auditing), and access requirements. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'listFlips' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description lacks details about filtering capabilities (mentioned in parameters), response structure, and ordering. Added information about available filters, what data each flip contains, and sort order to help AI agents understand how to query and interpret the results.

data.current_description: Returns a list of flips (status changes) this check has experienced.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of flips (status transitions) this check has experienced, showing when the check transitioned between up/down states. Results can be filtered by date range and status. Each flip includes the timestamp of the transition, previous status, new status, and reason for the change. Ordered by most recent first.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about filtering capabilities (mentioned in parameters), response structure, and ordering. Added information about available filters, what data each flip contains, and sort order to help AI agents understand how to query and interpret the results.

message: Operation 'listChannels' has semantic quality issues: inconsistent_terminology, missing_output_details. Description uses both 'integrations' and 'notification channels' inconsistently. Added clarity about what channel objects contain, their purpose in the system, and access requirements. This helps AI agents understand the relationship between channels and checks, and what data to expect.

data.current_description: Returns a list of integrations (notification channels) belonging to the project.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of all notification channels (integrations) configured for the project. Each channel object includes the channel type (email, webhook, Slack, etc.), name, and status. Channels are used to route notifications when checks change status. Requires read access to the project.
data.reasoning: Description uses both 'integrations' and 'notification channels' inconsistently. Added clarity about what channel objects contain, their purpose in the system, and access requirements. This helps AI agents understand the relationship between channels and checks, and what data to expect.

message: Operation 'listBadges' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Description lacks context about what badges are used for and their accessibility. Added information about badge formats, use cases (embedding in dashboards), and that badge URLs are public. This helps AI agents understand the purpose of this operation and how to use the returned badge URLs.

data.current_description: Returns a map of all tags in the project, with badge URLs for each tag in multiple formats.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a map of all tags used in the project, with publicly accessible badge URLs for each tag in multiple formats (SVG, PNG, JSON). Badges display the current status of checks with that tag and can be embedded in external dashboards or documentation. Does not require authentication to access badge URLs.
data.reasoning: Description lacks context about what badges are used for and their accessibility. Added information about badge formats, use cases (embedding in dashboards), and that badge URLs are public. This helps AI agents understand the purpose of this operation and how to use the returned badge URLs.
